title: Sajtmaskin domain rules
description: Editor validate-on-save contract for config/domain-rules.json. The runtime authority is src/lib/builder/domain-inference.ts, which builds Unicode-aware keyword regexes per domain from keywords_sv + keywords_en. This schema only guards the backoffice editor against schema-breaking edits; it does not run at runtime.

items.description: A single domain rule. At least one of keywords_sv/keywords_en must be non-empty (enforced via anyOf): the runtime spreads both into ONE alternation regex, so an all-empty rule compiles to `(?:)` — an empty alternation that matches almost any prompt and would shadow every later rule (a schema-valid but runtime-broken false-green).

domain.description: DomainProfile the rule maps to. Mirrors DOMAIN_PROFILES in src/lib/builder/domain-inference.ts (the runtime casts entry.domain to DomainProfile).

briefHint.description: Site-type hint returned by inferSiteTypeHintFromDomain() and fed to the brief LLM prompt.

keywords_sv.description: Swedish keywords spread together with keywords_en into one alternation regex. May be empty when a domain has no Swedish triggers, but at least one of keywords_sv/keywords_en must be non-empty (see the rule-level anyOf).

keywords_en.description: English keywords spread together with keywords_sv into one alternation regex. May be empty when a domain has no English triggers, but at least one of keywords_sv/keywords_en must be non-empty (see the rule-level anyOf).
